content: Rewrote the messy module from scratch. Felt scary to throw away so much code but the result is clean and I understand it fully now.
Long call with mom. She's been lonely. I listened more than I talked and it felt right.
Sat by the window for an hour doing nothing. The light was gold and everything felt quiet inside.
Tried making ramen from scratch. The broth was mediocre but the noodles were a small miracle. Still learning.
Nervous about the interview tomorrow. Kept reminding myself that I've prepared and the worst case is just information.
Reconnected with an old friend. We talked for three hours like no time had passed.
Shipped the redesign. Got a few kind notes. I'm trying to let myself feel this instead of immediately looking for the next thing.
Walked past the old library and remembered how much I used to love getting lost in there. Going back next weekend.
